member.name: T:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector
member.summary: 表示一个串口通道，使用RS232、RS485方式或USB转串口方式和硬件通讯

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.mConnectorWriteError
member.summary: 串口的写操作错误次数

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.mSerialPort
member.summary: 串口操作类

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.#ctor(DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail)
member.summary: 根据指定的串口参数，创建连接通道

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.GetConnectorType
member.summary: 返回此通道的类路径

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.ReadConnector
member.summary: 读通道中的数据

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.WriteByteBuf0(DotNetty.Buffers.IByteBuffer)
member.summary: 发送数据

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.ConnectAsync
member.summary: 打开串口

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.ConnectingNext(System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: 异步处理成功的后续操作

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.CheckConnector
member.summary: 检查通道是否已开启

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.CheckConnectedStatus
member.summary: 连接状态检查，当连接成功时，检查连接状态

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.CloseAsync
member.summary: 关闭串口

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortConnector.Release0
member.summary: 释放资源

member.name: T:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail
member.summary: 表示一个串口通讯的通道详情

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.Port
member.summary: 电脑上的串口号

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.Baudrate
member.summary: 波特率； 可选值：19200,115200 等标准值

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.#ctor(System.Byte)
member.summary: 根据串口号和波特率初始化

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Int32)
member.summary: 根据串口号和波特率初始化

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.GetTypeName
member.summary: 获取连接通道的类名

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.Equals(DoNetDrive.Core.Connector.INConnectorDetail)
member.summary: 用来比较此连接通道是否为同一个

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.GetKey
member.summary: 获取一个用于界定此通道的唯一Key值

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.ToString
member.summary: 打印此详情所指示的连接信息

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortDetail.GetAssemblyName
member.summary: 获取连接通道所在的程序集 例如：DoNetDrive.Core

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortFactory.lockobj
member.summary: 用于单例模式加锁的

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortFactory.mSerialPortFactory
member.summary: 用于生成TCP Server的分配器

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortFactory.GetInstance
member.summary: 获取用于生成TCPServer的分配器

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortFactory.CreateConnector(DoNetDrive.Core.Connector.INConnectorDetail,DoNetDrive.Core.IConnecterManage)
member.summary: 创建一个新的连接通道

member.name: M:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortFactory.CreateConnectorAsync(DoNetDrive.Core.Connector.INConnectorDetail,DoNetDrive.Core.IConnecterManage)
member.summary: 创建一个新的连接通道

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortStatus.Closed
member.summary: 空闲状态

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortStatus.Connected
member.summary: 表示串口已开启的状态

member.name: F:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortStatus.Connecting
member.summary: 正在打开串口

member.name: T:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortStatus_Closed
member.summary: 表示通道已关闭，未开启串口的状态

member.name: T:DoNetDrive.Connector.COM.SerialPortStatus_Connected
member.summary: 表示串口已开启的状态
